rationale: Gov't Code §2306.055 governs gubernatorial transfers of personnel and resources to divisions. It has no bearing on homestead exemption amounts under Tax Code §11.13(b).
quote: Sec. 2306.055. TRANSFERS FROM GOVERNOR. The governor may transfer to any division personnel, equipment, records, obligations, appropriations, functions, and duties of appropriate divisions of the governor's office.
_note: No conflict. The cited rule is unrelated to property tax homestead exemptions.
